name: Halloween Black Cat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the peanut butter, eggs, and water in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the cake mix to the mixture. Mix well until smooth.
3. Form the dough into 1-inch balls using your hands.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
6. Pinch out two ears at the top of each flattened cookie.
7. Add M&Ms for eyes and red hots for noses.
8. Press a fork into the dough to form whiskers.
Baking:
1. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
2. Let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
